entries.title: Häufige Fragen zum Immobilienverkauf
entries.notes: The route exists bilingually; supplied legal, tax, volume, rating, and partner claims remain evidence-gated.
entries.next_action: Maintain a reviewed-date and claim provenance if source answers are expanded.

entries.title: Öffnungszeiten und Anfahrt
entries.notes: The contact route and LocalBusiness data exist, but the supplied hours, directions, transport details, and FAQ are not implemented as a dedicated section.
entries.next_action: Verify office hours and live transport details, then integrate into the contact route or a justified child page.

entries.title: Echte Bewertungen erkennen
entries.notes: Review links exist on the homepage, but the educational credibility page does not. The source itself warns that superiority advertising needs dated evidence.
entries.next_action: Create only after capturing a dated live rating snapshot and defining legally supportable comparison wording.
publication_gates: No claim that Google proves customer identity

entries.title: Bodenrichtwerte in der Metropolregion
entries.notes: The topic appears in planning and seller-guide answers, but no dedicated route exists. Every number in the supplied table is explicitly marked as a placeholder.
entries.next_action: Source official BORIS/Gutachterausschuss values with dates and citations before implementation.

entries.title: Situationsbezogene Verkäufer-Landingpages
topics: move to care or sale in old age
sale by power of attorney or guardian
entries.notes: The cluster is planned only. Existing guidance prioritizes inheritance, renovation backlog, tenanted property, and separation rather than launching 12 thin pages at once.
entries.next_action: Validate search intent and evidence for the first four pages; use non-exploitative language and legal review.

entries.title: Referenzobjekte
entries.notes: A bilingual references page and 15 verified image derivatives exist, but supplied metrics and customer-specific claims remain approval-gated.
entries.next_action: Promote only cases with confirmed metrics, property-image permission, and customer approval.

entries.title: Übergabeprotokolle
entries.notes: The downloads route exists and source PDFs are curated, but the supplied templates are not public web downloads.
entries.next_action: Redesign as branded accessible documents and complete legal review before publishing.
